message:
perf: eliminate duplicate compare, fix union/intersect fallbacks, zero-copy vector rows

- merge.ts: remove duplicate compare(), reuse rowComparator() from types.ts (-15 lines)
- operators.ts: union fallback uses Uint32Array.from(set).sort() instead of [...set].sort()
- operators.ts: intersect fallback avoids .filter() (returns Array, not Uint32Array)
- columnar.ts: columnarBatchToRows uses Float32Array view for vectors instead of .slice() copy
